name: Hagezi NRD — last 7 days
description: Blocks newly registered domains (registered in the last 7 days). Newly registered domains are frequently abused for phishing, malware and scam campaigns. Aggressive — legitimate sites also register new domains, so expect false positives and whitelist critical services as needed.

name: Hagezi NRD — 8 to 14 days
description: Blocks domains registered 8 to 14 days ago. Combine with the shorter window for broader newly-registered-domain coverage. Aggressive — expect false positives and whitelist critical services as needed.

name: Hagezi NRD — 15 to 21 days
description: Blocks domains registered 15 to 21 days ago. Combine with the shorter windows for broader newly-registered-domain coverage. Aggressive — expect false positives and whitelist critical services as needed.

name: Hagezi NRD — 22 to 28 days
description: Blocks domains registered 22 to 28 days ago. Combine with the shorter windows for broader newly-registered-domain coverage. Aggressive — expect false positives and whitelist critical services as needed.

name: Hagezi NRD — 29 to 35 days
description: Blocks domains registered 29 to 35 days ago. Combine with the shorter windows for the widest newly-registered-domain coverage. Aggressive — expect false positives and whitelist critical services as needed.
